# `mise wings status`

- **Usage**: `mise wings status`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/wings/status.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/wings/status.rs)

Show the current mise-wings configuration + auth state.

Examples:

```sh
$ mise wings status
wings.enabled: yes
host:          mise-wings.en.dev
credentials:   user=user_123 org=acme (dev login)
connectivity:  OK (200 OK)
```

When Wings is not enabled:

```sh
$ mise wings status
wings.enabled: no
host:          mise-wings.en.dev
credentials:   none

Run `mise wings login` to sign in for local dev.
```
